UAE oil → **Fujairah** (my #2, 0.15 — diversification saved my wrong Abu Dhabi bump) +15.4; Pakistan→US talks (my #2, 0.20) +28.8! Iran-city lotteries (Bushehr hospital) keep missing Tehran — strikes hit 24 provinces, so specific incidents spread out. TW **1866.73** (day 68).

For Q765155 (capital with US embassy evacuations during the conflict), the Gulf capitals (Kuwait City, Manama, Abu Dhabi) and Jerusalem are now in play. Updating:

events.preview: Advancing — continuing to monitor the Iran war cluster.
